signal_payload.house: House of Family - anything that has to do with loyalty, support and protection and providing for one's family are favored

horoscope: Year of the Fire Horse begins today. Across the board, energy runs hot and home-centered, family before ambition. House of Family rules, so anything tethered to where you live, who you live with, and who you'd call from a hard day gets a tailwind. Most signs ride 65/35 in their favor. Dragons and Sheep, ease off the gas.

signal_payload.house: House of Family - anything that has to do with loyalty, support and protection and providing for one's family are favored

horoscope: Love today is family-shaped, not romance-shaped. The pull is toward people you've known a long time. Romance gets a softer tailwind, maybe 55/45. Long-term partnerships have the wind at their back. New connections need patience. Best move tonight: make plans with someone you'd already trust to crash on your couch.

horoscope: Money is in caution mode today, 40/60 against bold moves. Lunar New Year energy is good for setting intent, weak for spending. Skip the big purchase. Skip the launch. Pay a bill, balance a thing, set up the boring-but-important auto-transfer you've been meaning to. Foundation work this week. Growth work next.

horoscope: Tiger, your month is here. The wind is fully at your back, 90/10 in your favor. Spend today with people who matter. Call a sibling. Drop in on a parent. Show up for someone whose corner you've quietly been in. If a cause has been calling you lately, this is the green light. Trust your gut, it's been right all along.

horoscope: Love runs at even odds today, 50/50, but the kind that lasts is the kind that's already in your life. Skip the dating app. Call someone you've fallen out of touch with. If you're partnered, an old story, an old photo, an old recipe could shift the mood at home in your favor.

horoscope: Money plays defense today. The numbers are 25/75 against any new commitment, so don't sign, don't subscribe, don't buy the upgrade. The day rewards patience. If a deal feels rushed, that's the day talking, not the deal. By Friday the picture is clearer. Sit on it.
